```bash
./vendor/bin/pest tests/Feature/Middleware/
```

## ✨ WHAT CHANGED

### Before ETAP 1
- ❌ Middleware logic scattered across 40+ controllers
- ❌ Manual FraudControlService calls in controllers
- ❌ Duplicate correlation_id generation
- ❌ No consistent B2C/B2B handling
- ❌ No rate limiting on API
- ❌ BaseApiController had 150+ lines

### After ETAP 1 (Team Execution)
- ✅ 5 middleware classes handle all concerns
- ✅ Controllers clean (business logic only)
- ✅ BaseApiController only 8 helper methods
- ✅ Consistent middleware pipeline
- ✅ Redis-backed rate limiting
- ✅ Full test coverage
- ✅ CANON 2026 compliance
